title: Dreamy Cheesy American Silken Tofu Casserole
description: A romantic American dish featuring silken tofu in a rich, cheesy sauce, perfect for a cozy dinner, this low-sodium casserole is simmered to perfection and served hot on a stone plate.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large skillet, saute the chopped onion and minced garlic in olive oil until softened.
Add the cubed silken tofu to the skillet and cook until lightly browned.
In a separate saucepan, whisk together the low-sodium vegetable broth and all-purpose flour to make a thickening agent.
Bring the broth mixture to a simmer and cook until thickened, stirring constantly.
Remove the saucepan from the heat and stir in the shredded low-sodium cheddar and mozzarella cheese until melted and smooth.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked silken tofu, sauteed onion and garlic, and cheesy sauce, stirring until well combined.
Transfer the mixture to a hot stone plate and bake in the preheated oven for 20 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove the casserole from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
